message:
feat: Add Two-Flow alignment to string validation and formatting methods

Add isStringUncertain() and emitStringExpr() helpers to extract strings
from PyValue containers when uncertain. Updated 20+ methods:
- validation.zig: isdigit, isalpha, isalnum, isspace, islower, isupper,
  isascii, istitle, isprintable, isdecimal, isnumeric
- formatting.zig: lstrip, rstrip, capitalize, title, swapcase, index,
  rfind, rindex, ljust, rjust, center, zfill
